# deliberate malformed snapshot: level symbol does not match the surrounding sym block.
# The parser must reject this instead of normalizing it into `level 0 ...`.
version 1
meta seed 0 symbols 1 orders 2 max_qty 1000 max_notional 1000000
cmd reg S0
cmd limit 0 1 B 101 2 GTC
snapshot last_seq 1 trades 0
sym 0 bid 101 ask - orders 1
level 1 B 101 2
